title: Smuggizmo's Reinforced Blocks
description: A mod that adds some craftable obsidian reinforced blocks that have high blast resistance values to the game.
body:
A mod that adds some craftable obsidian reinforced blocks that have high blast resistance values to the game. This mod is perfect for those who want to make a base out of a "grief proof" material but don't like the looks of obsidian and want to make their base more aesthetically pleasing. The blocks in this mod reach up to 3000 blast resistance which is much higher than obsidian so this mod should work well for those with mods that have bombs that do more damage than tnt or the wither.

 

 

Credits:

Smuggzimo (Developer)

Mcreator (Software Used)
